name: DeepSeek-VL
metaDescription: DeepSeek-VL (DeepSeek), released 2024-03 — part of the DeepSeek VL line. First-generation dense vision-language models (1.3B and 7B) for real-world multimodal…
overview: DeepSeek-VL is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek VL line. Released 2024-03. Vision-language line for multimodal understanding (image + document + chart reasoning); V2 moved to a MoE backbone.
What's notable in this version: First-generation dense vision-language models (1.3B and 7B) for real-world multimodal understanding.
